_comment: Cross-tracker interoperability categories. Each category lists code_friendly_name patterns (substring match). Edit this file to adjust category membership without touching JS.

IDs.description: Persistent identifiers used to join records across trackers and to the Ownership API

Names.description: Human-readable identity fields used for display and deduplication

Status.description: Project/unit lifecycle status — biggest known value-encoding divergence across trackers

Capacity.description: Primary magnitude field — units vary by sector (MW, MTPA, bbl/day)

Location.description: Geographic fields for spatial queries and mapping

Temporal.description: Date and year fields required for time-sliced queries (operating in year X)

Entities.description: Owner and operator fields — standardized by the Ownership Tracker; key for company-level queries
